step_0.prompt: Let's sort this out! 🔍 First: have you been able to insert coins at the central display to start the dryer?

pay_help.prompt:
No problem! Insert coins at the central display:
• €3 = 15 min  •  €4 = 20 min  •  €5 = 25 min

Once the time appears on the display, press PAUSE to confirm and start.

pay_retry.prompt: Were you able to insert the coins and see time on the display? (yes / no)

transitionDescriptions.1: A price in euros — need more coins, shows how much to pay
transitionDescriptions.2: Minutes of drying time — shows countdown or remaining time
transitionDescriptions.6: Display is off, blank, no power, nothing showing

display_check.onInterruptFallback: Please describe what you see on the display 👀

check_credit.prompt:
The display shows the price 💶 Add more coins until the time appears:
• €3 = 15 min  •  €4 = 20 min  •  €5 = 25 min

Then press PAUSE to confirm.

check_start_btn.prompt: Your credit is accepted ✅ Press the PAUSE button to confirm your time and start the dryer.

door_close.prompt: DOOR means the door is not properly closed 🚪 Open it and close it firmly until you hear a click.

filter_alarm.prompt: The filter door alarm is active ⚠️ Clean the filter and sensor, then close the filter door properly and press STOP once to reset.

fallo_alarm_type.prompt: There is a FALLO alarm ⚠️ Which type do you see on the display?

transitionDescriptions.1: FALLO DE ROTACION — rotation fault, drum not spinning
transitionDescriptions.2: FALLO DE ASPIRACION — aspiration fault, airflow blockage
transitionDescriptions.3: Not sure, other fallo, unknown fault type

fallo_alarm_type.onInterruptFallback: Please describe the FALLO alarm you see on the display ⚠️

fallo_rotation.prompt: FALLO DE ROTACION = drum rotation sensor fault 🔧 This requires a technician check. I'm notifying the operator — please do not use this machine.

fallo_aspiration.prompt: FALLO DE ASPIRACION = airflow blockage 💨 Clean the filter and aspiration tube, then press STOP once to reset and try again.

fallo_generic.prompt: Press STOP once to reset the fault alarm and try again.

no_power.prompt: The display is off — this may be a power supply issue 🔌 I'm notifying the operator to check the machine.

check_result.prompt: Has the dryer started now? (yes / no)

check_retry.prompt: Let's try again. What does the display show now? 👀

transitionDescriptions.1: A price in euros — need more coins, shows how much to pay
transitionDescriptions.2: Minutes of drying time — shows countdown or remaining time
transitionDescriptions.6: Display is off, blank, no power, nothing showing

check_retry.onInterruptFallback: Please describe what you see on the display 👀

escalate_pay.prompt: I'm notifying the operator to help with the payment issue 🙌

escalate.prompt: I'm notifying the operator 🙌 They will check the dryer and assist you shortly.

ok.prompt: The dryer has started! ✅ Enjoy your drying cycle. If you need anything else, I'm here 😊

step_0.prompt: I'm sorry to hear there's an issue 😔 What happened after the drying cycle?

transitionDescriptions.1: Clothes still damp, not fully dried, still wet
transitionDescriptions.2: Burnt smell, burn marks on clothes
transitionDescriptions.3: Plastic melted on clothes, foreign object melted
transitionDescriptions.5: Unpleasant smell, bad odor, smells weird
transitionDescriptions.6: Door locked after cycle ended, can't open door

step_0.onInterruptFallback: Please describe what happened after the drying cycle 😔

damp.prompt: What do you think caused the clothes to stay damp?

transitionDescriptions.1: Clothes were already very wet from the washer, dripping, soaking
transitionDescriptions.2: Drum was too full, overloaded, too many clothes
transitionDescriptions.3: Cycle time was too short, not enough time, ended too quickly

damp.onInterruptFallback: Please describe what you think caused the clothes to stay damp

damp_washer.prompt:
⚠️ IMPORTANT: Never put soaking wet clothes in the dryer — it damages the filter.

If the washer's spin cycle failed (END+bAL), a re-wash in 2 separate machines may be needed. I'm notifying the operator to assess the situation.

damp_overload.prompt: The drum was too full — clothes in a ball don't dry evenly. I'm notifying the operator to assess whether a re-dry is possible.

damp_time.prompt: The cycle time was insufficient. I'm notifying the operator to assess whether a re-dry is possible.

burnt.prompt: I'm sorry about your clothes 😔 I'm notifying the operator to assess the damage. No automatic compensation is guaranteed — each case is evaluated individually.

plastic.prompt:
Plastic melting in the drum is caused by a foreign object left inside 🔍 Please always check the drum before use.

I'm notifying the operator — this is considered client responsibility, but each case is assessed individually.

stain.prompt: I'm sorry about the stains 😔 I'm notifying the operator. They will assess whether a re-wash compensation applies.

smell.prompt: An unpleasant smell can come from the drum or filter. I'm notifying the operator to check the machine and assess your case 🔧

door_locked.prompt: After the cycle ends, the door stays locked for about 2 minutes during the cooling phase 🌬️ Please wait and try again.

door_locked_check.prompt: Has the door opened now? (yes / no)

escalate_door.prompt: The door is still locked 🔒 I'm notifying the operator to assist you.

escalate.prompt: I'm notifying the operator 🙌 They will assist you shortly.

ok_post.prompt: Great! ✅ Glad it's resolved. If you need anything else, I'm here 😊
